mapper.select:
/* isnrMapper.getRegInsrMemberList */
/* 전일 생활안심요금제 개통고객 */ SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , B.SOC AS RATE_CD , (CASE WHEN FN_GET_AGE('X', A.CONTRACT_NUM) < 15 THEN 'A1' WHEN FN_GET_AGE('X', A.CONTRACT_NUM) >= 70 THEN 'A2' ELSE 'A0' END) AS INSR_CD , 'A' AS STAT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.SOC IN (SELECT RATE_CD FROM MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = 'dongbu') AND B.EXPIRATION_DATE = (SELECT MAX(EXPIRATION_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = B.SERVICE_TYPE AND SOC = B.SOC) UNION /* 전일 생활안심요금제로 변경한 고객 */ SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , B.SOC AS RATE_CD , (CASE WHEN FN_GET_AGE('X', A.CONTRACT_NUM) < 15 THEN 'A1' WHEN FN_GET_AGE('X', A.CONTRACT_NUM) >= 70 THEN 'A2' ELSE 'A0' END) AS INSR_CD , 'A' AS STAT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A WHERE B.SOC IN (SELECT RATE_CD FROM MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = 'dongbu') AND SUBSTR(B.EFFECTIVE_DATE, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND B.EXPIRATION_DATE = (SELECT MAX(EXPIRATION_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = B.SERVICE_TYPE AND SOC = B.SOC) AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') UNION /* 전일 명의변경, 정지복구 고객 중 생활안심요금제 이용고객 */ SELECT DISTINCT B.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SVC_CNTR_NO , C.SOC AS RATE_CD , (CASE WHEN FN_GET_AGE('X', A.CONTRACT_NUM) < 15 THEN 'A1' WHEN FN_GET_AGE('X', A.CONTRACT_NUM) >= 70 THEN 'A2' ELSE 'A0' END) AS INSR_CD , 'A' AS STAT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO C WHERE A.EVNT_CD IN ('MCN', 'RSP') AND A.EVNT_CD = A.SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD AND SUBSTR(A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND DECODE(A.EVNT_CD, 'MCN', DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, B.SVC_CNTR_NO, 'N', 'Y'), 'Y') = 'Y' AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.SOC IN (SELECT RATE_CD FROM MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = 'dongbu') AND C.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND C.EXPIRATION_DATE = (SELECT MAX(EXPIRATION_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = C.SERVICE_TYPE AND SOC = C.SOC) UNION /* 전일 개통고객 중 단체보험 신청고객 */ SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , C.SOC AS RATE_CD , B.INSR_CD , 'A' AS STAT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO C WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.INSR_CD IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0246' AND ETC2 = 'Y') AND B.CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG = 'Y' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND C.EXPIRATION_DATE = (SELECT MAX(EXPIRATION_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = C.SERVICE_TYPE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND TSK_TP = 'INS' AND REGST_DTTM > A.REG_DTTM) UNION /* 전일 변경신청고객 중 단체보험변경 및 동의서 등록고객 */ SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SVC_CNTR_NO , D.SOC AS RATE_CD , A.INSR_CD , 'A' AS STAT_CD FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP C , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO D WHERE A.TSK_TP = 'INS' AND A.INSR_CD IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0246' AND ETC2 = 'Y') AND A.SCAN_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND TSK_TP = 'INC' AND TRUNC(REGST_DTTM) >= TRUNC(A.REGST_DTTM)) AND TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SCAN_ID = C.SCAN_ID AND C.DOC_ID = 'E0021' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TRUNC(C.RGST_DT) = TRUNC(A.REGST_DTTM) AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND D.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND D.EXPIRATION_DATE = (SELECT MAX(EXPIRATION_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = D.SERVICE_TYPE)

/* isnrMapper.getCanInsrMemberList */ /* 전일 정지고객 조회 */
/* 전일 해지고객 조회 */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.INSR_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST B WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.STAT_CD = 'A' AND B.END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 전일 명의변경 조회 */ UNION SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , C.INSR_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST C WHERE A.EVNT_CD = 'MCN' AND SUBSTR(A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.CONTRACT_NUM <> B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.STAT_CD = 'A' AND C.END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 단체보험 변경시 이전 보험 해지 */ UNION SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , D.INSR_CD FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP C , MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST D WHERE A.TSK_TP = 'INS' AND A.INSR_CD IS NOT NULL AND A.CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG = 'Y' AND TRUNC(A.REGST_DTTM) = TRUNC(SYSDATE - #{dayCnt}) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND B.SCAN_ID = C.SCAN_ID AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.DOC_ID = 'E0021' AND TRUNC(C.RGST_DT) = TRUNC(A.REGST_DTTM) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND D.STAT_CD = 'A' AND D.INSR_CD IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0246' AND ETC2 = 'Y')
mapper.insert: /* isnrMapper.insertInsrMemberMst */ INSERT INTO MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST ( CONTRACT_NUM , END_DTTM , STRT_DTTM , SVC_CNTR_NO , CUSTOMER_ID , RATE_CD , STAT_CD , AGE , BIRTH_DT , MINOR_AGENT_NM , MINOR_AGENT_TEL , INSR_CD , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , '99991231235959' AS END_DTTM , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '000000' AS STRT_DTTM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.CUSTOMER_ID , #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS RATE_CD , 'A' AS STAT_CD , C.AGE , C.BIRTH_DT , B.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , B.MINOR_AGENT_TEL , #{insrCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INSR_CD , SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM , SYSDATE AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST_DTL B , ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , FN_GET_AGE('X', CONTRACT_NUM) AS AGE , (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1','2','5','6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3','4','7','8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END) || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* isnrMapper.insertPartnerDongbu01 */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_DONGBU_01 ( SEND_DT , CONTRACT_NUM , CUST_NM , CTN , MINOR_AGENT_NM , MINOR_AGENT_TEL , SUB_STATUS , JOIN_DT , CHANGE_DT , EFCT_STRT_DT , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , OPEN_AGNT_CD , OPEN_AGNT_NM , PYMN_YN , INSR_CD , EFCT_END_DT , BIRTH_DT ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS SEND_DT , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , A.MINOR_AGENT_NM , A.MINOR_AGENT_TEL , A.STAT_CD , SUBSTR(A.STRT_DTTM, 1, 8) AS JOIN_DT , DECODE(A.STAT_CD, 'A', '', SUBSTR(A.END_DTTM, 1, 8)) AS CHANGE_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS EFCT_STRT_DT , A.RATE_CD , DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, '', FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD)) AS RATE_NM , B.OPEN_AGNT_CD , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM /* 수납정보가 없는 최초 가입자에 한하여 수납(Y) 적용, 정산시에는 펜딩(P) 적용 */ , CASE WHEN A.STAT_CD = 'A' THEN CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND BILL_RFLC_IND_CD = 'B') THEN 'P' WHEN C.CONTRACT_NUM IS NOT NULL AND C.INV_AMT - C.PYM_AMT > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END AS PYMN_YN , A.INSR_CD , DECODE(A.STAT_CD, 'C', SUBSTR(END_DTTM, 1, 8), '') AS EFCT_END_DT , A.BIRTH_DT FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM /* 누적전송을 위햇서 MAX 사용 */ AND A.END_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(END_DTTM) FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND INSR_CD = A.INSR_CD) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = C.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) AND A.INSR_CD = C.INSR_CD(+) AND C.PARTNER_ID(+) = 'dongbu' AND C.BILL_YM(+) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM')
mapper.select: /* isnrMapper.getInsrMemberSendList */ SELECT CUST_NM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , MINOR_AGENT_NM , MINOR_AGENT_TEL , SUB_STATUS , JOIN_DT , CHANGE_DT , EFCT_STRT_DT , RATE_NM , OPEN_AGNT_NM , PYMN_YN , BIRTH_DT , EFCT_END_DT , INSR_CD FROM MSP_PARTNER_DONGBU_01 WHERE SEND_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY CONTRACT_NUM
